0: I help with the initiative's artifact search efforts, but you'll want to speak with Searchingway before you worry about any of that!

1: Interested in searching for an artifact or two? If you're after drone modules or have some discoveries to share, you're in the right place.

2: Speak with Kaede to exchange and obtain items related to the initiative's artifact search endeavors.

3: To begin scanning for artifacts, you will first need to acquire drone modules.

4: Using a drone module will launch a reconnaissance drone and initiate its artifact scanning subroutines. Discovered artifacts will be displayed on your map.

5: Once you have traveled to the displayed location, access the artifact to conduct analysis and thus obtain an ancient record.

6: Different grades of ancient records exist, each garnering a proportionate reward upon appraisal.

7: For more details regarding the search for artifacts, consult the Exploration Guide on your exotablet.

8: Perhaps you need a drone module or two? Or have you brought me some ancient records to appraise?

15: Drone modules are used to launch reconnaissance drones. The devices are optimized for use on a specific star, so they can only be used in their intended environment.

16: Truly exceptional contributors are awarded with dronebits when completing stellar missions. If you bring me sufficient quantities, I'll gladly provide drone modules in exchange!

17: They're repositories of data found within ancient artifacts. Our researchers would do just about anything to get their hands─or paws─on one.

18: Not all ancient records are created equally, though. Each is assigned a grade based on the volume of information contained within─the higher the grade, the greater the research value. I'll be happy to appraise your finds and offer appropriate compensation.
